name: Wheaton River Minerals Ltd.
description: Wheaton River Minerals Ltd. was a Canadian-based gold mining company that operated several mining assets across the Americas. The company gained significant prominence in the early 2000s for its aggressive growth strategy and acquisition of various gold and silver properties. In 2005, Wheaton River Minerals completed a major merger with Goldcorp Inc., a transaction valued at approximately $2.4 billion. Following this acquisition, Wheaton River Minerals ceased to exist as an independent entity, and its operations and assets were integrated into Goldcorp, which later became part of Newmont Corporation.
